items.name: accordion
items.description: A collapsible disclosure group; aria-expanded, aria-controls, arrow-key focus management, single or multiple open mode (WAI-ARIA APG disclosure pattern).
items.docs:
Register by importing components/ui/accordion.ts from your entry point. Pass `items` as an array of { id, label, defaultOpen? } and `type` ('single' | 'multiple'). Project panel content via named slots:
...
. Listen for `lv-change` ({ id, open }) on each toggle.

items.name: alert
items.description: An inline message banner; severity drives both colour and the ARIA live role.
items.docs: Register <lv-alert> by importing components/ui/alert.ts from your entry point.

items.name: badge
items.description: A small status pill mapping to the status tokens (success, warning, danger, info).
items.docs: Register <lv-badge> by importing components/ui/badge.ts from your entry point.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.description: An accessible breadcrumb navigation trail; nav landmark, ordered list, aria-current='page' on the current item, separator aria-hidden (WAI-ARIA breadcrumb pattern).
items.docs: Register <lv-breadcrumb> by importing components/ui/breadcrumb.ts from your entry point. Pass `items` as an array of { label, href? } from root to current. The last item is marked aria-current='page'. Set `separator` to change the divider glyph (default '/').

items.name: button
items.description: A token-styled button primitive that drives a wire action via l:click.
items.docs: Register <lv-button> by importing components/ui/button.ts from your entry point.

items.name: calendar
items.description: A standalone, inline month-grid date picker primitive (WAI-ARIA APG grid pattern); month nav with Lucide chevrons, roving-tabindex keyboard navigation (arrows + Home/End + PageUp/Down), single or range selection, today/selected/disabled states, min/max bounds, locale-aware first-day-of-week.
items.docs: Register <lv-calendar> by importing components/ui/calendar.ts from your entry point. Set `mode` ('single' | 'range'). Bind `value`: in single mode an ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD), in range mode 'start,end'. Optional `min` / `max` (ISO) bound the selectable range; set the `isDisabled` property to a `(iso) => boolean` predicate to disable individual days; `weekStart` (0=Sun, 1=Mon default) and `locale` control the header. Listen for `lv-change` to receive the new value string.

items.name: card
items.description: A surface container with optional labelled header region.
items.docs: Register <lv-card> by importing components/ui/card.ts from your entry point.

items.name: carousel
items.description: A slides carousel (WAI-ARIA APG carousel pattern); prev/next with Lucide arrows, ArrowLeft/Right keyboard nav, optional autoplay that pauses on hover/focus/hidden tab, per-slide aria-roledescription + live status region. Native CSS scroll-snap, horizontal or vertical.
items.docs:
Register by importing components/ui/carousel.ts from your entry point. Put one element per slide as direct children:
Slide 1
Slide 2
. The component adopts the children into its scroll viewport. Set `index` to drive the active slide, `orientation` ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), `loop` to wrap, and `autoplay` (ms, 0 = off). Listen for `lv-change` ({ index }).

items.name: chart
items.description: A token-driven charting wrapper rendering native inline SVG (bar / line / area) coloured by the --lv-color-chart-1..5 tokens. role=img + aria-label plus a visually-hidden data table for screen readers; a token-styled tooltip on hover/focus. Chosen over bundling Recharts: zero heavy dep, tree-shakeable, tokens cascade, SSR-friendly. Light-DOM Lit island.
items.docs: Register <lv-chart> by importing components/ui/chart.ts from your entry point. Set `type` 'bar' | 'line' | 'area', pass `categories` (x labels) and `series` as { key, label?, data: number[], color? }[] (color defaults to --lv-color-chart-N). Set `label` for the accessible name (also the data-table caption). Toggle `legend` / `showAxis`. Listen for `lv-point` ({ series, category, value, index }) on hover/focus. The visually-hidden table mirrors the data for screen readers.

items.name: checkbox
items.description: A token-styled checkbox control; renders a native input[type=checkbox] for free ARIA semantics.
items.docs: Register <lv-checkbox> by importing components/ui/checkbox.ts from your entry point.

items.name: collapsible
items.description: A single trigger that expands/collapses one content region (WAI-ARIA disclosure: aria-expanded + aria-controls, animated height via tokens).
items.docs: Register <lv-collapsible> by importing components/ui/collapsible.ts from your entry point. Set `label` for the trigger and project the body via the default slot; bind `open` for controlled state and listen for `lv-change` (detail = new open boolean).

items.name: command
items.description: A searchable command palette: filter-as-you-type over grouped items, full keyboard navigation (Up/Down skip disabled + wrap, Home/End, Enter selects, Escape closes), empty state, optional icons and shortcuts. WAI-ARIA combobox + listbox with aria-activedescendant. Search icon via the vendored Lucide map. Light-DOM Lit; often composed inside <lv-dialog> as a command-dialog.
items.docs: Register <lv-command> by importing components/ui/command.ts from your entry point. Pass `items` as { value, label, group?, icon?, shortcut?, keywords?, disabled? }[] (icon = a vendored Lucide name; keywords add synonyms to the filter). Listen for `lv-select` (chosen item value) and `lv-escape` (user pressed Escape). For a command-dialog, render <lv-command> inside <lv-dialog open> and close the dialog on lv-select / lv-escape.

items.name: context-menu
items.description: A right-click context menu opened at the pointer (WAI-ARIA APG menu pattern, matched to Radix ContextMenu); submenus, checkbox/radio items, separators; positioned by @floating-ui/dom with flip + shift.
items.docs: Register <lv-context-menu> by importing components/ui/context-menu.ts from your entry point. Put the right-clickable region in the default slot; pass `items` as an array of { key, label, icon?, shortcut?, disabled?, type?: 'item'|'checkbox'|'radio'|'separator'|'submenu', checked?, radioGroup?, children? }. Listen for `lv-select` (detail = activated item key) and `lv-checked-change` (detail = { key, checked }) for checkbox/radio toggles.

items.name: data-table
items.description: A sortable, paginated data table with WAI-ARIA grid semantics; column-header aria-sort, client-side sort + pagination, emits lv-sort and lv-page events.
items.docs: Register <lv-data-table> by importing components/ui/data-table.ts from your entry point. Pass `columns` (array of { key, label, sortable?, align? }) and `rows` (array of plain objects). Listen for `lv-sort` ({ key, direction }) and `lv-page` ({ page }) to integrate server-side sorting/pagination.

items.name: date-picker
items.description: An accessible calendar date-input with a floating month-grid dialog (WAI-ARIA APG date-picker pattern); keyboard-navigable grid, positioned by @floating-ui/dom.
items.docs: Register <lv-date-picker> by importing components/ui/date-picker.ts from your entry point. Bind `value` to an ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD). Listen for `lv-change` to receive the selected date string.

items.name: dialog
items.description: An accessible modal dialog with focus trap, Escape-to-close, aria-modal, and return-focus (WAI-ARIA APG dialog pattern).
items.docs: Register <lv-dialog> by importing components/ui/dialog.ts from your entry point. Bind `open` to control visibility. Listen for `lv-close` to update state. Supply `heading` for a labelled dialog; use the `footer` slot for action buttons.

items.name: drawer
items.description: A slide-in sheet anchored to a viewport edge (right/left/bottom/top); same dialog ARIA semantics as lv-dialog plus focus trap and Escape-to-close.
items.docs: Register <lv-drawer> by importing components/ui/drawer.ts from your entry point. Bind `open` to control visibility; set `side` to 'right' | 'left' | 'bottom' | 'top'. Listen for `lv-close` to update state.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.description: A keyboard-navigable floating action menu (WAI-ARIA APG menu-button pattern); positioned by @floating-ui/dom with flip + shift.
items.docs: Register <lv-dropdown-menu> by importing components/ui/dropdown-menu.ts from your entry point. Pass `items` as an array of { key, label, icon?, disabled?, separator? }. Listen for `lv-select` to receive the activated item key.

items.name: field
items.description: A label + control + error wrapper composition component; wires accessible label and error associations.
items.docs: Register <lv-field> by importing components/ui/field.ts from your entry point. Set the `for` prop to the input's id for label association.

items.name: file-upload
items.description: A drag-and-drop file upload zone (UI only, wire to backend yourself); keyboard-accessible drop zone (role=button), file list with remove buttons, aria-live file count announcements.
items.docs: Register <lv-file-upload> by importing components/ui/file-upload.ts from your entry point. Set `accept` and `multiple` as on a native input. Listen for `lv-files-change` to receive the UploadFile[] array and submit to your backend separately.

items.name: hover-card
items.description: A hover-triggered floating preview card (Radix hover-card model: preview affordance, no ARIA role, not focus-trapping); open/close delays, positioned by @floating-ui/dom with offset + flip + shift.
items.docs: Register <lv-hover-card> by importing components/ui/hover-card.ts from your entry point. Slot the trigger in slot="trigger" and the preview body in slot="content". It opens on pointer-enter/focus after `open-delay` (ms, default 300) and closes after `close-delay` (default 300); set `placement` (default bottom). It is preview-only: keep the same info reachable in the page flow for assistive tech. Listen for `lv-open`/`lv-close`.

items.name: icons
items.description: Lucide icon body map for Lit islands: `iconBody(name)` returns the inner SVG markup for a vendored Lucide icon, inlined into the component's own <svg> wrapper and tinted via --lv-* tokens + currentColor. A registry dependency, not a standalone component.
items.docs: Internal helper; pulled in automatically as a dependency of any lievit-ui component that renders an inline Lucide icon (e.g. calendar, carousel). Import { iconBody } and inline unsafeSVG(iconBody(name)) inside an <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"> wrapper.

items.name: input
items.description: A token-styled single-line text input that participates in l:model binding.
items.docs: Register <lv-input> by importing components/ui/input.ts from your entry point.

items.name: input-otp
items.description: A segmented one-time-code input: N real input slots with auto-advance, backspace/arrow navigation, paste-fill, per-type character filtering (numeric/alphanumeric/alpha), one-time-code autofill on the first slot, and a mirrored hidden input for form submission. Full WAI one-time-password-field ARIA (role=group + per-slot Character N of M labels).
items.docs: Register <lv-input-otp> by importing components/ui/input-otp.ts from your entry point. Set `length` (default 6), `type` (numeric|alphanumeric|alpha), and `name` to submit the joined value via the mirrored hidden input inside any HTML form. Listen for `lv-input` (current value, possibly partial) and `lv-complete` (fired once all slots are filled). Use `mask` to render password slots, `invalid` for the error ring.

items.name: label
items.description: A token-styled form label with native for/id association and optional required marker.
items.docs: Register <lv-label> by importing components/ui/label.ts from your entry point.

items.name: light-dom
items.description: Light-DOM styling helper shared by every primitive: adopts a component's base stylesheet once per document. A registry dependency, not a standalone component.
items.docs: Internal helper; pulled in automatically as a dependency of any lievit-ui component.

items.name: menubar
items.description: A horizontal application menubar (File / Edit / View ...) following the WAI-ARIA APG menubar pattern, matched to Radix Menubar; Left/Right move between menus, Down opens, roving tabindex, one open menu at a time, submenus + checkbox/radio items.
items.docs: Register <lv-menubar> by importing components/ui/menubar.ts from your entry point. Pass `menus` as an array of { key, label, disabled?, items } where items are { key, label, icon?, shortcut?, disabled?, type?: 'item'|'checkbox'|'radio'|'separator'|'submenu', checked?, radioGroup?, children? }. Listen for `lv-select` (detail = { menu, key }) and `lv-checked-change` (detail = { menu, key, checked }).

items.name: navigation-menu
items.description: A site navigation bar with rich dropdown panels (a navigation landmark, not a menu role), matched to Radix NavigationMenu; intent-delay hover open, pointer-leave close, real <a> links, Escape closes, arrow keys move between triggers; positioned by @floating-ui/dom.
items.docs: Register <lv-navigation-menu> by importing components/ui/navigation-menu.ts from your entry point. Pass `items` as an array of { key, label, href? (plain link), links? } where links are { label, href, description?, icon? }; an item with `links` becomes a trigger that opens a content panel, otherwise it is a bare <a>. Set `label`, `open-delay`, `close-delay`. Links are real anchors (browser navigation); listen for `lv-open` / `lv-close` (detail = { key }) to react to panel state.

items.name: popover
items.description: A click-triggered floating panel anchored to a trigger (WAI-ARIA dialog-popover, Radix model); positioned by @floating-ui/dom with offset + flip + shift, Escape + click-outside to dismiss, optional focus trap.
items.docs:
Register by importing components/ui/popover.ts from your entry point. Slot the trigger in slot="trigger" and the panel body in slot="content": `Open
Body
`. Set `placement` (default bottom), `disabled`, or `trap-focus` to cycle Tab within the panel. Listen for `lv-open`/`lv-close`.

items.name: progress
items.description: A determinate or indeterminate progress bar with WAI-ARIA progressbar semantics; respects prefers-reduced-motion.
items.docs: Register <lv-progress> by importing components/ui/progress.ts from your entry point.

items.name: radio-group
items.description: An accessible radio button group; role=radiogroup/radio, aria-checked, roving tabindex, arrow-key navigation (WAI-ARIA APG radio group pattern).
items.docs: Register <lv-radio-group> by importing components/ui/radio-group.ts from your entry point. Pass `options` as an array of { value, label, disabled? }, `value` for the selected option, and `label` for the group name. Listen for `lv-change` to receive the selected value string.

items.name: resizable
items.description: A group of panels separated by draggable handles (native equivalent of react-resizable-panels). Pointer drag + keyboard (Arrow/Home/End/Enter on a role=separator with aria-orientation + aria-valuenow/min/max) resize; horizontal or vertical; per-panel min/max and optional collapse. Token-styled handle with an optional Lucide grip.
items.docs: Register <lv-resizable> by importing components/ui/resizable.ts from your entry point. Pass `panels` as an array of { id?, size?, min?, max?, collapsible? } (sizes are percentages). Project each panel's content into the matching named slot `panel-0`, `panel-1`, ... Set `direction` to 'horizontal' (default) | 'vertical', toggle `with-handle` for the grip, and listen for `lv-resize` (detail `{ sizes }`).

items.name: rich-select
items.description: A searchable single/multi select with floating listbox, inline search filter, tag pills for multi-selection, and full WAI-ARIA APG combobox/listbox keyboard navigation; positioned by @floating-ui/dom.
items.docs: Register <lv-rich-select> by importing components/ui/rich-select.ts from your entry point. Pass `options` as { value, label, description?, disabled? }[]. Set `multiple` for multi-select. `value` is a string (single) or string[] (multi). Listen for `lv-change`.

items.name: scroll-area
items.description: A scrollable viewport with a styled, token-driven scrollbar overlay (Radix scroll-area structure); native scrolling, keyboard, wheel and touch are preserved, the custom thumb is drag- and track-page-able. Vertical, horizontal, or both.
items.docs: Register <lv-scroll-area> by importing components/ui/scroll-area.ts from your entry point. Give the element a fixed width/height and put the overflowing content inside its default slot. Set `orientation` to 'vertical' (default) | 'horizontal' | 'both', and `type` to 'hover' (default) | 'scroll' | 'always' to control when the bars appear.

items.name: select
items.description: A custom select with a floating listbox positioned by @floating-ui/dom; full WAI-ARIA APG listbox keyboard navigation.
items.docs: Register <lv-select> by importing components/ui/select.ts from your entry point. Pass `options` as an array of { value, label, disabled? }.

items.name: separator
items.description: A thin divider with role=separator and orientation.
items.docs: Register <lv-separator> by importing components/ui/separator.ts from your entry point.

items.name: sheet
items.description: A modal side panel that slides in from any of the four viewport edges (the shadcn-shaped generalisation of drawer): dialog ARIA, focus trap, Escape and backdrop-click close, structured header/footer/title/description slots, and a built-in Lucide close button. Token-driven overlay + z-index.
items.docs: Register <lv-sheet> by importing components/ui/sheet.ts from your entry point. Bind `open` to control visibility; set `side` to 'right' (default) | 'left' | 'top' | 'bottom'. Set `heading` + `description` (or project the `title` / `description` slots), the body via the default slot, actions via the `footer` slot. Listen for `lv-close` to update state. Toggle `show-close` and `dismissible` as needed. Note: <lv-drawer> remains for the simpler heading+body shape; <lv-sheet> is the richer composition.

items.name: sidebar
items.description: The application sidebar primitive: collapsible expanded/icon-rail desktop states, mobile off-canvas overlay, its own provider + trigger (toggle() + Ctrl/Cmd+B shortcut), localStorage persistence, groups/menu/menu-sub with Lucide icons and badges, a <nav> landmark with aria-current on the active item. Light-DOM Lit island.
items.docs: Register <lv-sidebar> by importing components/ui/sidebar.ts from your entry point. Pass `groups` as { label?, items: { key, label, icon?, href?, badge?, disabled?, items? }[] }[] (icon = a vendored Lucide name; nested `items` become a collapsible sub-tree). Set `active` to the current item key for aria-current; set `side` 'left' | 'right' and `collapsible` 'icon' | 'offcanvas'. Project a logo/user via the `header` / `footer` slots. Call `el.toggle()` (or Ctrl/Cmd+B) to collapse on desktop / open the overlay on mobile; the desktop state persists under `storageKey`. Listen for `lv-navigate` (chosen item key) and `lv-state-change` ('expanded' | 'collapsed').

items.name: slider
items.description: A single-thumb range slider; wraps a native input[type=range] for free ARIA semantics (aria-valuemin/max/now, keyboard navigation).
items.docs: Register <lv-slider> by importing components/ui/slider.ts from your entry point. Bind `value`, `min`, `max`, `step`. Listen for `lv-change` to receive the new numeric value. Set `show-value` to render the current value beside the track.

items.name: spinner
items.description: A busy indicator with role=status and an accessible label; respects reduced motion.
items.docs: Register <lv-spinner> by importing components/ui/spinner.ts from your entry point.

items.name: switch
items.description: A toggle switch implementing the WAI-ARIA APG switch pattern (role=switch, aria-checked).
items.docs: Register <lv-switch> by importing components/ui/switch.ts from your entry point.

items.name: tabs
items.description: A keyboard-navigable tab bar with associated panels; roving tabindex, aria-selected, aria-controls, arrow-key navigation (WAI-ARIA APG tabs pattern).
items.docs:
Register by importing components/ui/tabs.ts from your entry point. Pass `tabs` as an array of { id, label, disabled? } and `value` for the initial active tab. Project panel content via named slots:
...
. Listen for `lv-change` to receive the activated tab id.

items.name: textarea
items.description: A token-styled multi-line text input that participates in l:model binding.
items.docs: Register <lv-textarea> by importing components/ui/textarea.ts from your entry point.

items.name: toast
items.description: A brief overlay notification with WAI-ARIA live-region semantics; auto-dismisses after a configurable duration.
items.docs: Register <lv-toast> by importing components/ui/toast.ts from your entry point. Toggle the `open` boolean property to show/hide.

items.name: toggle
items.description: A two-state pressed button (WAI-ARIA toggle button: aria-pressed) with shadcn variants/sizes and an optional Lucide icon.
items.docs: Register <lv-toggle> by importing components/ui/toggle.ts from your entry point. Bind `pressed` for controlled state and listen for `lv-change` (detail = { pressed, value }). `variant` (default|outline), `size` (sm|default|lg), optional `icon` (Lucide name); set `aria-label` for icon-only toggles.

items.name: toggle-group
items.description: A set of toggles with single (radiogroup) or multiple (group + aria-pressed) selection; roving-tabindex arrow-key nav per Radix.
items.docs: Register <lv-toggle-group> by importing components/ui/toggle-group.ts from your entry point. Pass `items` as { value, label?, icon?, disabled? }[], set `type` (single|multiple) and bind `value` (string for single, string[] for multiple). Listen for `lv-change` (detail = new value). `variant`, `size` cascade to every item; set `aria-label` for an icon-only group.

items.name: tokens
items.description: The lievit-ui design tokens as --lv-* CSS custom properties. Copied in on first use; the shared design vocabulary every component references.
items.docs: Import styles/lievit-tokens.css once from your global stylesheet. Override any --lv-* value in :root to retheme.

items.name: tooltip
items.description: A floating contextual label positioned by @floating-ui/dom; WAI-ARIA tooltip pattern (role=tooltip, aria-describedby).
items.docs: Register <lv-tooltip> by importing components/ui/tooltip.ts from your entry point. Wrap any trigger and set the `content` prop.
